Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface IContextPointerArray

All Superinterfaces:
ISCState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextPointerArray
public interface IContextPointerArray extends ISCState
A context pointer array serves to manage references to contexts. The structure of context relationships is a directed acyclic graph which is flattened by the static checker. The context pointer array is used to keep track of conflicts caused by multiple sees in a machine or extends clauses in a context. Conflicts are caused whenever an identifier, carrier set or constant, is declared in two different contexts that are (transitively) referenced by a context or machine.
Since:
1.0

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    IContextPointerArray.PointerType
    The enumerated type PointerType is used determine whether this context pointer array is used with sees clauses in a machine or extends clauses in a context.

    Returns the index in this context pointer array of the context with the specified name.

    Returns a reference to the statically checked context file associated with the specified index.

  • Method Details

    • getContextPointerType

      IContextPointerArray.PointerType getContextPointerType()
      Returns the type of context pointers used with this context pointer array.
      Returns:
      the type of context pointers used with this context pointer array

    • hasError

      boolean hasError(int index)
      Returns whether the error flag of the context pointer with the specified index is set.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the context pointer
      Returns:
      whether the error flag of the context pointer with the specified index is set

    • size

      int size()
      Returns the number of context pointers contained in this context pointer array.
      Returns:
      the number of context pointers contained in this context pointer array

    • getPointerIndex

      int getPointerIndex(String contextName)
      Returns the index in this context pointer array of the context with the specified name.
      Parameters:
      contextName - the name of the context
      Returns:
      the index of the context

    • getContextPointer

      IInternalElement getContextPointer(int index)
      Returns the context pointer associated with the specified index. This is either IExtendsContext or ISeesContext depending on the pointer type (IContextPointerArray.PointerType) of this context pointer array.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the context pointer
      Returns:
      the context pointer with the specified index

    • getSCContextFile

      IRodinFile getSCContextFile(int index)
      Returns a reference to the statically checked context file associated with the specified index. This is the statically checked context retrieved by means of IExtendsContext or ISeesContext. This is a convenience method to facilitate access to the referenced (statically checked) contexts.

      If the returned value is null for some index, this means that no file has been specified and the index should be ignored.

      Parameters:
      index - the index of the statically checked context file
      Returns:
      a reference to the statically checked context file file associated with the specified index
